        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
# Check what syntheseus provides out of the box
from syntheseus.reaction_prediction.inference import RootAlignedModel
import inspect

# Get the source file
source_file = inspect.getfile\(RootAlignedModel\)
print\(f"RootAlignedModel source: {source_file}"\)

# Get method signatures
print\(f"\\nRootAlignedModel.__init__ signature:"\)
print\(inspect.signature\(RootAlignedModel.__init__\)\)

print\(f"\\nRootAlignedModel._get_reactions signature:"\)
print\(inspect.signature\(RootAlignedModel._get_reactions\)\)
EOF)
